name: Volumetric Lithograph
description: Psychedelic linocut terrain — forward-dollying flight over an infinite audio-reactive landscape. Terrain swells follow melody (f.mid_att primary) with bass swell secondary; palette cycles with melodic phrasing; spectral-flux accents flare peaks and strobe the cut-line ridge on any timbral attack. No atmospheric fog (printmaking has no aerial perspective).
author: Matt
_comment_scene_fog: 0 disables fog (was actually MAXIMUM fog in pre-v3 due to PresetDescriptor+SceneUniforms fallback bug; fixed alongside v3)
